name: google/flood-forecasting
description: Deep learning models for global flood forecasting
readme:
# Flood Forecasting

This repository contains the implementation of our Nature paper on global flood forecasting.

## Installation

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Usage

```python
from flood_forecasting import Model
model = Model.load('pretrained/model.pt')
predictions = model.predict(basin_data)
```

## Datasets

- ERA5-Land reanalysis data
- GRDC streamflow observations

## Citation

```bibtex
@article{smith2024flood,
  title={Deep learning for global flood forecasting},
  author={Smith, John and Doe, Jane},
  journal={Nature},
  year={2024}
}
```

keyFiles.configs/default.yaml:
model:
  architecture: lstm
  hidden_size: 256
  num_layers: 3
training:
  learning_rate: 0.001
  batch_size: 32
  epochs: 100
